name: planning-team
summary: Decision-complete planning team for turning evidence and repo truth into implementation briefs.

roles.name: goal-clarifier
roles.responsibility: Resolve the real goal, success criteria, and constraints before solution shaping.
roles.stop_condition: The problem is explicit enough that solution quality can be judged.

roles.name: plan-author
roles.responsibility: Write the minimum decision-complete plan needed for execution safety.
roles.stop_condition: An executor does not need to make major product or architecture decisions.

roles.name: execution-briefer
roles.responsibility: Convert the plan into a compact operator handoff for the executing model.
roles.stop_condition: A cheaper or narrower worker can execute without dragging the whole planning context along.

collapse_condition: Requirements are already clear, scope is small, and a single worker can write the brief directly from repo state.
escalate_condition: Requirements are ambiguous, multiple stakeholders or constraints compete, or the plan must survive handoff to a cheaper model.

primitives: subagents when planning surface is large
delegated runtime agents when role separation matters
